description: Launched on BNB Chain in Q3 2020, PancakeSwap Token (CAKE) is the native token for the BSC-based DEX, PancakeSwap. Now as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 CAKE gives original CAKE holders, users and traders instant finality, ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: PancakeSwap Token
